script_text: <speak>Great job! <break time='300ms'/> We found the perfect starting level for you. <break time='400ms'/> Here's how <phoneme alphabet='ipa' ph='ɹiːdiː'>Readee</phoneme> works. <break time='300ms'/> First, you'll do fun lessons that teach you new reading skills, step by step. <break time='300ms'/> Then, you'll practice with cool interactive questions. You can drag, tap, and build your answers! <break time='300ms'/> And the best part? You earn carrots for every lesson! Use them in the shop, and see how you rank on the leaderboard. <break time='400ms'/> Ready? Let's start reading!</speak>
voice_direction: Read this like a cheerful, warm, encouraging elementary school teacher talking directly to a young child. Be excited and celebratory:
